payload.goal: Re-review the install-wizard PRD updates after addressing prior review findings.
payload.why: Confirm that REQ-F-012/013/014 and US-012/US-013 are now precise, testable, and consistent; confirm traceability matrix remains correct.
inputs_already_verified: Updates added explicit bash/fish rc-file rules, non-interactive semantics, marker sentinel lines, and sudo boundary definitions.
changes: Verify the previously flagged gaps are resolved and acceptance criteria are pass/fail testable.
Check that requirements do not introduce contradictions (e.g., sudo usage vs shell edits as user).
Re-check traceability links for FEAT-009, REQ-F-012/013/014, US-012/US-013.
done_when: Review returns approve (or needs_changes with any remaining concrete issues).
